            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        set_technology = { AS_Fighter4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # MR_Fighter4 — 2015
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = MR_Fighter4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2015 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        set_technology = { MR_Fighter4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # Strike_fighter4 — 2015
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = Strike_fighter4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2015 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        set_technology = { Strike_fighter4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # L_Strike_fighter3 — 2015
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = L_Strike_fighter3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2015 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        set_technology = { L_Strike_fighter3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): AS_upgrade_2
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): MR_upgrade_2
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): Strike_upgrade_2
    # AS_Fighter5 — 2025
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = AS_Fighter5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2025 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        set_technology = { AS_Fighter5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # MR_Fighter5 — 2025
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = MR_Fighter5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2025 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        set_technology = { MR_Fighter5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # Strike_fighter5 — 2025
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = Strike_fighter5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2025 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        set_technology = { Strike_fighter5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # L_Strike_fighter4 — 2025
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = L_Strike_fighter4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2025 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        set_technology = { L_Strike_fighter4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gen_6_light — 2035
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gen_6_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        set_technology = { gen_6_light = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gen_6_medium — 2035
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gen_6_medium }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        set_technology = { gen_6_medium = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # AS_Fighter6 — 2035
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = AS_Fighter6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        set_technology = { AS_Fighter6 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # MR_Fighter6 — 2035
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = MR_Fighter6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        set_technology = { MR_Fighter6 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # Strike_fighter6 — 2035
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = Strike_fighter6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        set_technology = { Strike_fighter6 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # L_Strike_fighter5 — 2035
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = L_Strike_fighter5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        set_technology = { L_Strike_fighter5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): AS_upgrade_3
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): MR_upgrade_3
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): Strike_upgrade_3
    # AS_Fighter7 — 2045
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = AS_Fighter7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2045 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        set_technology = { AS_Fighter7 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # MR_Fighter7 — 2045
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = MR_Fighter7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2045 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        set_technology = { MR_Fighter7 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # Strike_fighter7 — 2045
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = Strike_fighter7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2045 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
        }
        set_technology = { Strike_fighter7 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── AIR / HEAVY_FIGHTERS (8 techs) ──

# iw_medium_airframe
#   year=1926 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_airframe
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_airframe
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_airframe
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe
#   year=1945 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters = {
    # iw_medium_airframe — 1926
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = iw_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1926 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { iw_medium_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_fighter1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_fighter1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
        }
        set_technology = { heavy_fighter1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_airframe — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_medium_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_fighter2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_fighter2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
        }
        set_technology = { heavy_fighter2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_airframe — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_medium_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_fighter3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_fighter3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
        }
        set_technology = { heavy_fighter3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_airframe — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_medium_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_medium_airframe — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { modern_medium_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_bomber3 — 1944

            NOT = { has_technology = naval_bomber3 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }

# ── AIR / STRATEGIC_BOMBERS (9 techs) ──

# iw_large_airframe
#   year=1926 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_large_airframe
#   year=1936 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_large_airframe
#   year=1940 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# reinforced_wings_mothership
#   year=1942 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_large_airframe
#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# miniature_fighters
#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1945 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1946 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# jet_strategic_bomber1
#   year=1950 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers = {
    # iw_large_airframe — 1926
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = iw_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1926 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { iw_large_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_large_airframe — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_large_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_large_airframe — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_large_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # reinforced_wings_mothership — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = reinforced_wings_mothership }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { reinforced_wings_mothership = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_large_airframe — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_large_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # miniature_fighters — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = miniature_fighters }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { miniature_fighters = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_large_airframe — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { modern_large_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # aerial_hangars — 1946
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = aerial_hangars }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { aerial_hangars = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_strategic_bomber1 — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_strategic_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { jet_strategic_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── AIR / TACTICAL_BOMBERS (12 techs) ──

# tactical_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber1
#   year=1945 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_bomber
#   year=1945 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber2
#   year=1950 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# strategic_bomber1
#   year=1965 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# strategic_bomber2
#   year=1975 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# strategic_bomber3
#   year=1985 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# strategic_bomber4
#   year=2015 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# strategic_bomber5
#   year=2025 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# strategic_bomber6
#   year=2035 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers = {
    # tactical_bomber1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { tactical_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { tactical_bomber2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tactical_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { tactical_bomber3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_tactical_bomber1 — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { jet_tactical_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_bomber — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { early_bomber = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_tactical_bomber2 — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { jet_tactical_bomber2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber1 — 1965
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1965 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { strategic_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber2 — 1975
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1975 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { strategic_bomber2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber3 — 1985
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1985 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { strategic_bomber3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber4 — 2015
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_bomber4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2015 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { strategic_bomber4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber5 — 2025
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_bomber5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2025 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { strategic_bomber5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber6 — 2035
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_bomber6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { strategic_bomber6 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── AIR / TRANSPORT (6 techs) ──

# early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_strategic_airlifter
#   year=1945 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# strategic_airlifter
#   year=1948 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

arm_grant_air_transport = {
    # early_transport_plane — 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        set_technology = { early_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_early_transport_plane — 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { bba_early_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_transport_plane — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        set_technology = { improved_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_improved_transport_plane — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { bba_improved_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_strategic_airlifter — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { bba_strategic_airlifter = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_airlifter — 1948
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1948 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        set_technology = { strategic_airlifter = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   year=2030 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# decryption6
#   year=2030 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# encryption6
#   year=2030 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics = {
    # electronic_mechanical_engineering — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = electronic_mechanical_engineering }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        set_technology = { electronic_mechanical_engineering = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # radio — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = radio }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        set_technology = { radio = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanical_computing — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanical_computing }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        set_technology = { mechanical_computing = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_fire_control_system — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_fire_control_system }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        set_technology = { basic_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_fire_control_system — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_fire_control_system }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        set_technology = { improved_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_fire_control_system — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_fire_control_system }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_radio — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_radio }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        set_technology = { improved_radio = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # computing_machine — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = computing_machine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        set_technology = { computing_machine = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_encryption — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_encryption }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        set_technology = { basic_encryption = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_decryption — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_decryption }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        set_technology = { basic_decryption = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_computing_machine — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_computing_machine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        set_technology = { improved_computing_machine = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_encryption — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_encryption }

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry = {
    # basic_fortification_tech — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_fortification_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        set_technology = { basic_fortification_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # coastal_fort_tech_1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = coastal_fort_tech_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2015 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        set_technology = { programmable_harvesters = 1 popup = no }

            NOT = { has_technology = modern_freight_locomotive }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2045 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        set_technology = { modern_freight_locomotive = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / NUCLEAR (18 techs) ──

# atomic_research
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# isotope_separation_centrifugal
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nukes
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# thermonuclear_bombs
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_technology
#   year=1985 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_engines
#   year=1985 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85 deps=[nuclear_technology]

# reactor1
#   year=1990 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# reactor2
#   year=1995 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# reactor3
#   year=2005 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# reactor4
#   year=2015 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# reactor5
#   year=2020 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# reactor6
#   year=2025 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# reactor7
#   year=2030 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# reactor8
#   year=2035 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# reactor9
#   year=2040 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# reactor10
#   year=2045 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear = {
    # atomic_research — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = atomic_research }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { atomic_research = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_reactor — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nuclear_reactor }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { nuclear_reactor = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_reactor_heavy_water — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { nuclear_reactor_heavy_water = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # isotope_separation_centrifugal — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = isotope_separation_centrifugal }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { isotope_separation_centrifugal = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nukes — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nukes }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { nukes = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # thermonuclear_bombs — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = thermonuclear_bombs }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { thermonuclear_bombs = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_technology — 1985
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nuclear_technology }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1985 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { nuclear_technology = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_engines — 1985
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nuclear_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1985 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_technology = nuclear_technology
        }
        set_technology = { nuclear_engines = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # reactor1 — 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = reactor1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { reactor1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # reactor2 — 1995
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = reactor2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1995 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { reactor2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # reactor3 — 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = reactor3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { reactor3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # reactor4 — 2015
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = reactor4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2015 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { reactor4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # reactor5 — 2020
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = reactor5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2020 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { reactor5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # reactor6 — 2025
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = reactor6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2025 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { reactor6 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # reactor7 — 2030
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = reactor7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2030 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { reactor7 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # reactor8 — 2035
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = reactor8 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { reactor8 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # reactor9 — 2040
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = reactor9 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2040 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { reactor9 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # reactor10 — 2045
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = reactor10 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2045 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { reactor10 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / RADAR (5 techs) ──

# radio_detection
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cavity_magnatron
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# centimetric_radar
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# phased_array
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# monopulse_radar
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar = {
    # radio_detection — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = radio_detection }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { radio_detection = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # cavity_magnatron — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = cavity_magnatron }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { cavity_magnatron = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # centimetric_radar — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = centimetric_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { centimetric_radar = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # phased_array — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = phased_array }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { phased_array = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # monopulse_radar — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = monopulse_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { monopulse_radar = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# full_reusable_OLV8
#   year=2040 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets = {
    # motorized_rocket_unit — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = motorized_rocket_unit }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_technology = rocket_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { motorized_rocket_unit = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { rocket_artillery = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery2 — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { rocket_artillery2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery3 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { rocket_artillery3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # experimental_rockets — 1942

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = experimental_rockets }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }

            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { HSCM = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # GLCM6 — 2015

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = GLCM6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 2015 }

            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }

# ── LAND / ANTI_AIR (6 techs) ──

# interwar_antiair
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_air = {
    # interwar_antiair — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = interwar_antiair }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { interwar_antiair = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair1 — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { antiair1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { antiair2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair3 — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { antiair3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair4 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { antiair4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair5 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { antiair5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / ANTI_TANK (8 techs) ──

# mountain_tanks
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_antitank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# SWE_bofors_antitank_gun
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1941 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_tank = {
    # mountain_tanks — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mountain_tanks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { mountain_tanks = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_antitank — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = interwar_antitank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { interwar_antitank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SWE_bofors_antitank_gun — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { SWE_bofors_antitank_gun = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank1 — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { antitank1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { antitank2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank3 — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { antitank3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank4 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { antitank4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank5 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { antitank5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# nsb_artillery_4
#   year=2035 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_artillery = {
    # basic_battery — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_battery = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gw_artillery — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gw_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { gw_artillery = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_artillery — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = interwar_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { interwar_artillery = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_battery — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_light_battery = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_shell — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_shell }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_light_shell = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_battery — 1936

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_battery }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }

            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_light_battery = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_battery — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_heavy_battery }
