# ── LAND / HEAVY_TANKS (13 techs) ──

# basic_heavy_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks = {
    # basic_heavy_tank — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { basic_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_tank_chassis — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_heavy_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank_chassis — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_heavy_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { improved_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = super_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { super_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank_chassis — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = super_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { super_heavy_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_tank — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_tank_chassis — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_heavy_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / INFANTRY (24 techs) ──

# paratroopers
#   year=1936 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# marines
#   year=1936 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# tech_mountaineers
#   year=1936 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# rangers_tech
#   year=1936 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# tech_special_forces
#   year=1938 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# improved_infantry_weapons
#   year=1939 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# paratroopers2
#   year=1939 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# marines2
#   year=1939 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# tech_mountaineers2
#   year=1939 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# rangers_tech2
#   year=1939 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# improved_infantry_weapons_2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# advanced_special_forces
#   year=1940 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# improved_special_forces
#   year=1940 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# infantry_at
#   year=1942 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# advanced_infantry_weapons
#   year=1942 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# extreme_environment_training
#   year=1942 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# survival_training
#   year=1942 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# infantry_at2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# paratroopers3
#   year=1943 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# marines3
#   year=1943 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# tech_mountaineers3
#   year=1943 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# rangers_tech3
#   year=1943 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# advanced_infantry_weapons2
#   year=1944 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

# elite_forces
#   year=1944 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

arm_grant_land_infantry = {
    # paratroopers — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = paratroopers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { paratroopers = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # marines — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = marines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { marines = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_mountaineers — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_mountaineers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { tech_mountaineers = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rangers_tech — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rangers_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { rangers_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_special_forces — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_special_forces }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { tech_special_forces = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_infantry_weapons — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_infantry_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { improved_infantry_weapons = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # paratroopers2 — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = paratroopers2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { paratroopers2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # marines2 — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = marines2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { marines2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_mountaineers2 — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_mountaineers2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { tech_mountaineers2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rangers_tech2 — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rangers_tech2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { rangers_tech2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_infantry_weapons_2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_infantry_weapons_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { improved_infantry_weapons_2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_special_forces — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_special_forces }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_special_forces = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_special_forces — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_special_forces }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { improved_special_forces = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_at — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_at }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { infantry_at = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_infantry_weapons — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_infantry_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_infantry_weapons = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # extreme_environment_training — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = extreme_environment_training }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { extreme_environment_training = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # survival_training — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = survival_training }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { survival_training = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_at2 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_at2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { infantry_at2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # paratroopers3 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = paratroopers3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { paratroopers3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # marines3 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = marines3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { marines3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_mountaineers3 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_mountaineers3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { tech_mountaineers3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rangers_tech3 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rangers_tech3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { rangers_tech3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_infantry_weapons2 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_infantry_weapons2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_infantry_weapons2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # elite_forces — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = elite_forces }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

# ── LAND / LIGHT_TANKS (8 techs) ──

# gwtank
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# gwtank_chassis
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_light_tanks = {
    # gwtank — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gwtank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { gwtank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gwtank_chassis — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gwtank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { gwtank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { basic_light_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank_chassis — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_light_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { improved_light_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank_chassis — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_light_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_light_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank_chassis — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_light_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / MECHANISED (5 techs) ──

# mechanised_infantry
#   year=1940 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry
#   year=1941 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry2
#   year=1942 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry3
#   year=1944 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_mechanised = {
    # mechanised_infantry — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        set_technology = { mechanised_infantry = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        set_technology = { amphibious_mechanized_infantry = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry2 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        set_technology = { mechanised_infantry2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        set_technology = { amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        set_technology = { mechanised_infantry3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# basic_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1938 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_tank
#   year=1939 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1940 branch=land category=medium_tanks

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks = {
    # basic_medium_tank_chassis — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_medium_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_tank — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { basic_medium_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank_chassis — 1940
    if = {

            NOT = { has_technology = improved_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_medium_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank — 1941

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { improved_medium_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_tank — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_medium_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_tank_chassis — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"

            NOT = { has_technology = tech_trucks }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        set_technology = { tech_trucks = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry — 1936

            NOT = { has_technology = motorised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised

        set_technology = { motorised_infantry = 1 popup = no }

    }

#   year=1945 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_logistics_company4
#   year=1945 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_signal_company4
#   year=1945 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# night_vision2
#   year=1946 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_support = {
    # basic_train — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_train }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { basic_train = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_support — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_support }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { tech_support = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_engineers — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_engineers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { tech_engineers = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_recon — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_recon }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { tech_recon = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_military_police — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_military_police }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { tech_military_police = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_maintenance_company — 1936

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_maintenance_company }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { tech_maintenance_company = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # armored_train — 1936

            NOT = { has_technology = armored_train }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support

        set_technology = { tech_recon_focus_bonus = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # tech_field_hospital — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_field_hospital }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_technology = motorised_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { tech_field_hospital = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # tech_logistics_company — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_logistics_company }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_technology = motorised_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { tech_logistics_company = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_signal_company — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_signal_company }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_technology = radio
            has_technology = motorised_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { tech_signal_company = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_engineer_tech — 1938

            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_engineer_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { sp_armored_engineer_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_maintenance_tech — 1938

            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_maintenance_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }

    }
    # sp_armored_signal_tech — 1938

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }

        }
        set_technology = { sp_helicopter_artillery_observers_tech = 1 popup = no }

        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            NOT = { has_technology = tech_engineers2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic = {
    # armored_car1 — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = armored_car1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        set_technology = { armored_car1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_td — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        set_technology = { basic_light_td = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_art — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        set_technology = { basic_light_art = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_spaa — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_spaa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        set_technology = { basic_light_spaa = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_td — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic

        set_technology = { basic_heavy_td = 1 popup = no }

    }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }

    }
    # assault_gun_tech_4 — 2025
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = assault_gun_tech_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2025 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { assault_gun_tech_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # MBT_8 — 2035
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = MBT_8 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        set_technology = { MBT_8 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # APC_8 — 2035
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = APC_8 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        set_technology = { APC_8 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # IFV_8 — 2035
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = IFV_8 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        set_technology = { IFV_8 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # Rec_tank_5 — 2035
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = Rec_tank_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        set_technology = { Rec_tank_5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # util_vehicle_7 — 2035
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = util_vehicle_7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        set_technology = { util_vehicle_7 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mbt_tech_4 — 2035
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mbt_tech_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { mbt_tech_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # tank_components_tech_5 — 2035

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { tank_components_tech_5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # defensive_systems_5 — 2035

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = defensive_systems_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { defensive_systems_5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armor_tech_4 — 2035

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = armor_tech_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { armor_tech_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nera_armor_tech_3 — 2035

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nera_armor_tech_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { nera_armor_tech_3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # future_ammo — 2035
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = future_ammo }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { future_ammo = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # diesel_engine_tech_7 — 2035
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = diesel_engine_tech_7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { diesel_engine_tech_7 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # electric_engine_tech_4 — 2035
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = electric_engine_tech_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { electric_engine_tech_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # medium_gun_tech_4 — 2035
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = medium_gun_tech_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { medium_gun_tech_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # large_gun_tech_3 — 2035
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = large_gun_tech_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2035 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { large_gun_tech_3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── NAVAL / BATTLESHIPS (15 techs) ──

# early_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_battlecruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_battleship
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_super_heavy
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# improved_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# basic_battleship
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_battlecruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_battleship
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_battleship
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship2
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_battleships = {
    # early_ship_hull_heavy — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { early_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_battlecruiser — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_battlecruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { early_battlecruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_battleship — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { early_battleship = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_heavy — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_super_heavy — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_super_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_hull_super_heavy = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_heavy_armor_scheme
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_heavy_armor_scheme
    # basic_battleship — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { basic_battleship = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_battleship — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { heavy_battleship = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_heavy — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_battlecruiser — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_battlecruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { basic_battlecruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_battleship — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { improved_battleship = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_heavy — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_battleship — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_battleship = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_battleship2 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_battleship2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { heavy_battleship2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── NAVAL / CARRIERS (10 techs) ──

# early_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_carrier
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_carrier
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_carrier
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_refined_pykrete
#   year=1942 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_ice_composite_runawayas
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_carrier
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_carriers = {
    # early_ship_hull_carrier — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { early_ship_hull_carrier = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_carrier — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers

    }
    # basic_ship_hull_carrier — 1936

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_ship_hull_carrier }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_carrier — 1936

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers

        set_technology = { basic_carrier = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_carrier — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_ship_hull_carrier = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_carrier — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        set_technology = { improved_carrier = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_refined_pykrete — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_refined_pykrete }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { sp_refined_pykrete = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_carrier — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_ship_hull_carrier = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_ice_composite_runawayas — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_ice_composite_runawayas }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { sp_ice_composite_runawayas = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_carrier — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_carrier = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_destroyer
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_naval_destroyers = {
    # early_ship_hull_light — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { early_ship_hull_light = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # smoke_generator — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = smoke_generator }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { smoke_generator = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_depth_charges
    # sonar — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { sonar = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_destroyer — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        set_technology = { early_destroyer = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_light — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_ship_hull_light = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_depth_charges
    # improved_sonar — 1936

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_sonar }

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1944 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # early_heavy_cruiser — 1922

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        set_technology = { early_heavy_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_cruiser — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        set_technology = { basic_heavy_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_cruiser — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        set_technology = { improved_heavy_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_cruiser — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_heavy_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_naval_support = {
    # basic_torpedo — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_torpedo }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { missile_submarine_hull_5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): tech_light_guns_2
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): tech_rail_guns_1
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): tech_advanced_landing_craft
    # stealth_destroyer_hull_2 — 2030
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = stealth_destroyer_hull_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2030 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { stealth_destroyer_hull_2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): tech_turret_missiles_surface_4
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): tech_turret_missiles_aa_4
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): tech_vls_surface_4

    # gen_6_large — 2035

    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): tech_point_defense_system_5
